fallback.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

boundary.title: Something Exploded
boundary.message: A wild error appeared! Don't worry, your data is safe.

server.AGENT_ID_REQUIRED: Agent ID or conversation ID is required
server.INVALID_MESSAGE_FORMAT: Each message must have role and parts
server.MESSAGE_FIELDS_REQUIRED: Message ID, role, and parts are required
server.SKILL_IN_USE: Skill is assigned to agents and cannot be deleted
server.MCP_SERVER_IN_USE: MCP server is referenced by agents and cannot be deleted
server.INVALID_TRANSPORT_TYPE: Transport type must be one of: stdio, sse, http
server.SCHEDULED_AT_REQUIRED: Scheduled time is required for one-time jobs
server.INVALID_SCHEDULED_AT: Scheduled time must be a valid date
server.NO_MODELS_CONFIGURED: No models configured for this provider
server.AUDIO_NOT_FOUND_ON_DISK: Audio file not found on disk
